was in Guru-Ravi-Guru. Ravi and Guru have a near 6-8 rela
tion.
12. The sextile brought honour and recognition. This was
Budha-Budha-Ravi. The sextile was favourable.
13. The conjunction of Uranus suddenly caught him in a
legal battle. It was forced on him and won. The coQ,junction
first gave worry and then peace. It was in Shani-Budha
Shani.
14. The opposition of Neptune gave him continuous finan
cial benefits. It was Budha-Shukra-Budha.
In this way we can find the aspects of the planets to and
from these four factors and relate them to the Vimshottari.
This will provide a tolerably correct rectification ofthe time of
birth.

Symbolic Directions 123
We commend this method. It should be related also to
Tables I, II, III and IV presented in Chapter III. If the result
predicted on the basis of the symbolic directions agree
with those given by the Vimshottari system, then on the
basis of the tables I, III and VI given in Chapter III the time
